headline: A Look At Zoom Communications (ZM) Valuation After The Launch Of ZoomMate AI Work Surface
summary: Zoom Communications (ZM) is back in focus after launching ZoomMate, an AI work surface that ties meeting conversations directly into search, workflows, and content creation across tools like Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Workday. See our latest analysis for Zoom Communications. That launch comes after a sharp swing in sentiment, with the stock up 35.75% on a 90 day share price return and a 1 year total shareholder return of 29.36%, signalling building momentum despite a weaker 5 year total...
